event: 3.7 × 2.9 × 2.7 cm enhancing lesion in right temporal lobe
gross total resection of right temporal mass
histopathology revealed WHO Grade III anaplastic astrocytoma
immunohistochemical stain for mutant IDH-1 (p.R132H) positive
fluorescence in-situ hybridization showed loss of 19q
started on radiation (5940 cGy in 33 fractions)
CBC prior to adjuvant TMZ: Hgb 9.3
presented to emergency department 2 weeks later
started on granulocyte monocyte-colony stimulating factor
received cord blood stem cell transplantation
